description: E2E test of CTO Play workflow using alerthub-e2e-test PRD. Tests full lifecycle from intake through deployment with Healer monitoring. NOTE: This is a platform test using MCP tools, not a coding task.

userStories.title: Verify local services and configuration
userStories.description: As a tester, I need all local services running with correct configuration
acceptanceCriteria: Run: curl http://localhost:8081/health - PM Server responds OK
Run: curl http://localhost:8083/health - Healer responds OK
Read cto-config.json and verify defaults.play.autoMerge is true
Read cto-config.json and verify defaults.play.healerEndpoint is 'http://localhost:8083'
If services not running, log to progress.txt: 'BLOCKED: Start services with `mprocs` or `just dev-*`'
userStories.notes: This story verifies prerequisites before calling MCP tools

userStories.title: Initiate intake via CTO MCP tool
userStories.description: As a tester, I want to start intake using the mcp_cto_intake tool
acceptanceCriteria: Call MCP tool: mcp_cto_intake(project_name='alerthub-e2e-test')
Verify Linear project created in response
Verify PRD issue created with Morgan assigned
Log intake workflow name to progress.txt
Delegate to @healer-monitor subagent to verify session: 'Check http://localhost:8083/api/v1/sessions/active'

userStories.title: Monitor intake completion
userStories.description: As a tester, I want to verify intake workflow completes successfully
acceptanceCriteria: Call MCP tool: mcp_cto_jobs() to list running workflows
Wait for intake workflow to show 'Succeeded'
Verify tasks.json was generated (check docs repository)
Log task count and agentHints to progress.txt
Delegate to @healer-monitor: 'Check for any A10/A11/A12 alerts in logs'
userStories.notes: May need to poll mcp_cto_jobs() until intake completes

userStories.title: Start Play workflow
userStories.description: As a tester, I want to start the Play workflow using MCP tool
acceptanceCriteria: Call MCP tool: mcp_cto_play()
Verify workflow submitted (check response for workflow name)
Call MCP tool: mcp_cto_play_status() to confirm task started
Log play workflow name and task_id to progress.txt
Delegate to @healer-monitor: 'Verify Healer received session notification and shows expected tools'
userStories.notes: Play auto-detects next task from tasks.json

userStories.title: Monitor Play agent sequence
userStories.description: As a tester, I want to verify agents execute in correct order
acceptanceCriteria: Call MCP tool: mcp_cto_play_status() periodically
Verify stages progress: implementation → quality → security → testing → integration
Log each stage transition to progress.txt with timestamps
Delegate to @healer-monitor: 'Watch for tool inventory mismatch or MCP init failures'
If any stage fails, log error details and do NOT mark as passing
userStories.notes: Sequence: Bolt/Rex → Cleo → Cipher → Tess → Atlas

userStories.title: Verify Healer monitoring
userStories.description: As a tester, I want to confirm Healer caught any issues
acceptanceCriteria: Delegate to @healer-monitor: 'Query http://localhost:8083/api/v1/sessions/active and report all detected issues'
If issues detected, verify GitHub issues were created
Log any escalations (Discord notifications, GitHub issues) to progress.txt
Verify no unhandled errors in Healer logs
userStories.notes: This validates the Healer dual-model architecture

userStories.title: Complete full lifecycle verification
userStories.description: As a tester, I want to confirm the entire lifecycle completed
acceptanceCriteria: Call MCP tool: mcp_cto_play_status() to verify workflow Succeeded
Verify PR was merged (autoMerge=true should have triggered Atlas merge)
Delegate to @healer-monitor: 'Final status report - any unresolved alerts?'
Log final summary to progress.txt with success/failure count
If ALL checks pass, lifecycle is complete
userStories.notes: Success means full E2E from intake to merged PR
